description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist design. The front features a spacious patio with outdoor seating, potted plants, and large floor-to-ceiling windows that allow ample natural light into the living area. The exterior walls are predominantly white, accented by black window frames and light wood doors. The interior layout is open, with visible living, kitchen, and bedroom spaces, and the furnishings are contemporary. The house includes a main entry door, several windows of varying sizes, and a rear section with additional rooms. The overall structure is rectangular, with a focus on open, airy spaces and functional outdoor-indoor flow.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious front patio. The design is minimalist, featuring white walls, black accents, and contemporary furnishings.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main patio with outdoor seating, large black-framed windows, and the main entrance, highlighting the open living area.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the rear rooms, a secondary window, and the depth of the house, with less emphasis on the patio.
description_view_2: The back view displays the rear entrance, additional windows, and the overall rectangular shape, with minimal exterior features.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the living room with a large TV, interior furnishings, and a partial view of the patio and entryway.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a single light wood door, a covered patio with outdoor seating, potted plants, and large glass panels.
